Code fragment: public final TableField<ExaminationsRecord, Float> EXAMTIME = createField(DSL.name("examTime"), SQLDataType.REAL.nullable(false), this, "");
Explanation: The 'examTime' column uses REAL (floating-point) type which can cause precision loss for time values. Consider using DECIMAL or NUMERIC for fixed-precision storage, or an INTEGER type if storing time in minutes/seconds.
